scope: Progressive authoring queue for promoting source-companion pages into authored publication pages without exposing internal drafts or weakening citation requirements.

stageDefinitions.label: Demand And Gap Driven
stageDefinitions.rule: Promote source companions that already have routed demand, gap links, or unresolved review pressure.

stageDefinitions.label: Fold Into Existing Authored Pages
stageDefinitions.rule: Attach source companions to nearby authored pages when the public page already exists.

stageDefinitions.label: Promote Remaining Source Companions
stageDefinitions.rule: Create new authored source maps or reference pages for companions without a public target.

stageDefinitions.label: Covered By Authored Pages
stageDefinitions.rule: Keep source companions in retrieval inventory when authored pages already name them in relatedGeneratedPages.

stageDefinitions.label: Final Candidate Review
stageDefinitions.rule: Review authored candidates by lane, then promote approved pages to published status.

candidateReviewLaneDefinitions.label: Final Review Ready
candidateReviewLaneDefinitions.rule: Run final editorial/source/link checks and promote approved pages to published status.

candidateReviewLaneDefinitions.label: Editorial Review
candidateReviewLaneDefinitions.rule: Tighten prose, structure, and page shape before final publish review.

candidateReviewLaneDefinitions.label: Publication-Date Review
candidateReviewLaneDefinitions.rule: Refresh time-sensitive product, market-count, fee, security, chain, and audit claims before publishing.

candidateReviewLaneDefinitions.label: Current Source Refresh
candidateReviewLaneDefinitions.rule: Refresh current primary-source evidence before publishing source-sensitive pages.

candidateReviewLaneDefinitions.label: Operator Review
candidateReviewLaneDefinitions.rule: Keep pages out of published status until product, risk, legal, accounting, security, or operator review clears.
